backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing a snack ordering system with catalog management, shopping cart, checkout with tip support, order tracking, and bank account storage using Map-based state and blob storage for images.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the removal of delete button and functionality from ProductCard component to prevent public users from deleting catalog items.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration for the food truck snack ordering application with admin authentication.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes with warm food truck color palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application titled 'Chosen One Tri-State Snack on the Go'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for catalog, product detail, cart, checkout, order confirmation, admin pages (snacks, orders, bank), and about page, wrapped in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart item display component showing product thumbnail, name, price, quantity, and calculated subtotal in a card layout.
frontend/src/components/ImageUpload.tsx: Reusable image upload component with file selection, preview, validation, and ExternalBlob creation with upload progress tracking for backend integration.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header navigation showing About and cart to all users, admin links (Snacks, Orders, Bank Info, Admin) only when authenticated via PIN, and a barely visible lock icon in footer for admin access.
frontend/src/components/PinAuthDialog.ts: A dialog component for admin PIN authentication that validates a 4-digit PIN code and manages authentication state using the useAdminAuth hook.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a snack item card with image, name, description, and price, with click handlers to navigate to the product detail page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an ICP actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Manages admin authentication state using sessionStorage with a hardcoded PIN (8914), providing authenticate and logout functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Generates and persists a unique user ID in localStorage for cart management across sessions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including fetching snack items, managing cart, checkout, orders, and admin functions like adding/deleting items and updating order status.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with a warm food truck color theme (orange/yellow primary colors) for both light and dark modes, using Poppins and Pacifico fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Static about page displaying the Chosen One snack truck's mission, founding year (2026), and value propositions with icons and cards.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin panel page for managing snack items and viewing bank account information. Provides a form to add new snack items with ID, name, description, price, and image upload functionality.
frontend/src/pages/BankInformation.tsx: Bank information management page where users can add or update bank account details (account holder name, bank name, account number, routing number) for receiving customer payments.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with quantities, subtotal calculation, and options to clear cart or proceed to checkout. Shows empty state when cart has no items.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page with customer information form (name, email, address, phone) and tip selection options (none, 10%, 15%, 20%, or custom). Calculates subtotal, tip, and total before placing order.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Order confirmation page displaying order details after successful checkout, including order ID, customer information, order items, and payment breakdown with subtotal, tip, and total amounts.
frontend/src/pages/OrderManagement.tsx: Admin page displaying all customer orders with details including customer info, items, pricing breakdown with tips, and order totals. Uses useAdminOrderManagement hook and shows loading skeletons and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/ProductCatalog.tsx: Public-facing product catalog page with hero banner, food truck image, and grid of snack items using ProductCard components. Fetches all snack items via useGetAllSnackItems hook.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page showing individual snack item with image, description, price, and quantity selector. Allows adding items to cart and navigating back to catalog.
frontend/src/pages/SnackManagement.tsx: Admin page for viewing and deleting snack items from the catalog. Displays snacks in a grid with delete buttons using AlertDialog confirmation and handles deletion via useDeleteSnackItem hook.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, extended animations, custom fonts (Poppins and Pacifico), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document indicating work to remove public delete functionality from ProductCard and ProductDetail pages, with admin operations requiring PIN 8914 authentication.
